title: gothofreda monantha
side_effects: Gothofreda monantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to the high concentration of alkaloids in its leaves. Prolonged use can also lead to liver damage, skin rashes, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of Gothofreda monantha has been linked to respiratory problems, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult with a medical professional or an experienced herbalist before using Gothofreda monantha for any health purposes.
